form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== workOrderId[工单] jobCardId[报工单] operationId[工序] lineNo[行号] lotStatus[批次状态] =========>input[投入信息]====== inputLotId[投入批次] inputMaterialId[投入物料] inputQty[投入数量] inputUoMId[投入单位] =========>output[产出信息]====== outputLotId[产出批次] outputMaterialId[产出物料] outputQty[产出数量] outputUoMId[产出单位] =========>date[日期信息]====== productionDate[生产日期] productionTime[生产时间] isInputConsumed[投入已消耗] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== workOrderId[工单] jobCardId[报工单] operationId[工序] lineNo[行号] lotStatus[批次状态] =========>input[投入信息]====== inputLotId[投入批次] inputMaterialId[投入物料] inputQty[投入数量] inputUoMId[投入单位] =========>output[产出信息]====== outputLotId[产出批次] outputMaterialId[产出物料] outputQty[产出数量] outputUoMId[产出单位] =========>date[日期信息]====== productionDate[生产日期] productionTime[生产时间] isInputConsumed[投入已消耗] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: workOrderId[工单] jobCardId[报工单] lotStatus[批次状态] lineNo[行号] productionDate[生产日期]
